    Subclasses of Counter in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.util
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FastNonCollidingCounter
    An implementation of Counter that uses an IntIntHashMap to store values "Fast" in that it is faster than using something that involves other HashMaps, and boxing to-and-from primitive values.
    class 
    NonZeroCachingCounter
    An extension of Counter that caches which entries are non-zero.
